caption: In a formal legislative setting, several people are seated in tiered rows of wooden desks. A man in a dark blue suit and tie sits on the right, while a woman in a white cardigan over a dark top and another woman in a red jacket are positioned to his left. In the foreground, two men are seated; one wears a grey suit and glasses, and the other wears a grey suit and looks downward. A logo for "ORCA" is visible on the left side of a green and white information bar. The text on this bar reads, "April 12, 2019," "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs," and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." Objects on the desks include a water bottle, a red bottle, and various papers. As the scene progresses, the man in the grey suit in the foreground shifts his hand toward his face, and the man in the blue suit turns his head slightly.
